action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py works correctly, rendering views at specific camera poses using TripoSR. Test render succeeded. Analysis: Need to submit evaluation to get baseline LPIPS score and measure eval time. The predict.py already handles the case where checkpoint doesn't contain fine-tuning weights. Decision: Create dummy checkpoint and submit eval to get baseline.
action.command: python -c "import torch; torch.save({'dummy': True}, 'checkpoints/dummy.pt')" && python test_full_predict.py
